WebResource.Description: ROM TSIS 2.0 Work Order Ribbon Scripts
WebResource.DependencyXml: <Dependencies><Dependency componentType="WebResource"><Library name="ts_/resx/WorkOrderExport.1033.resx" displayName="ts_/resx/WorkOrderExport.1033.resx" languagecode="1033" description="ROM TSIS 2.0 Work Order PDF Export English Resource Strings" libraryUniqueId="{968c4c3c-bc52-2a83-a941-ca694a5183a3}"/><Library name="ts_/resx/WorkOrderExport.1036.resx" displayName="ts_/resx/WorkOrderExport.1036.resx" languagecode="1036" description="ROM TSIS 2.0 Work Order PDF Export French Resource Strings" libraryUniqueId="{25bd4c82-c473-6022-0437-6d38ac41899b}"/></Dependency></Dependencies>
